# JagFx

JagFx is a .NET 8 toolkit for Old School RuneScape `.synth` sound-effect files. It includes a binary reader/writer, JSON interchange format, DSP renderer, CLI, Avalonia desktop editor, JavaScript helpers, and WASM package work.

Full LLM context: [`llms-full.txt`](llms-full.txt).

## Format

`.synth` files are big-endian binary patches rendered as mono 22,050 Hz audio. A patch has ten voice slots and a loop footer. Voices can contain envelopes, LFOs, gate envelopes, additive partials, echo, duration/offset fields, and an optional IIR filter.

See [`docs/synth-format-spec.md`](docs/synth-format-spec.md) for the binary layout and synthesis formulas.

## JSON

JagFx JSON is for patch editing, tests, generated patches, and diffs.

- Schema: [`schemas/synth.schema.json`](schemas/synth.schema.json)
- Reference conversions: [`references/json/`](references/json/)

Key constraints:

- at most ten voices per patch
- at most ten partials per voice
- partial amplitude `0` terminates the binary partial list
- `USmart16`: `0` through `32767`
- `Smart16`: `-32768` through `16383`

## CLI

```bash
dotnet run --project src/JagFx.Cli -- to-json input.synth output.json
dotnet run --project src/JagFx.Cli -- from-json input.json output.synth
dotnet run --project src/JagFx.Cli -- convert input.synth output.wav
dotnet run --project src/JagFx.Cli -- inspect input.synth
```

## Projects

| Project | Role |
| --- | --- |
| `JagFx.Core` | Shared types and constants. |
| `JagFx.Domain` | Immutable patch model. |
| `JagFx.Io` | Binary, JSON, and WAV I/O. |
| `JagFx.Synthesis` | DSP rendering. |
| `JagFx.Cli` | CLI commands. |
| `JagFx.Desktop` | Avalonia editor. |
| `packages/jagfx` | JS/TS CLI-backed helpers. |
| `packages/jagfx-wasm` | WASM package and playground. |

## Build

```bash
dotnet build
dotnet test
bun --cwd=packages/jagfx test
bun --cwd=packages/jagfx-wasm test
```
